site.title: Iqela eliSebenzayo lokuFikelela kuZwelonke
site.tagline: Ukusuka kwimfuno yokufikeleleka ukuya kwi-repo yoluntu
nav.label: Owona mgangatho uphambili
meta.home.description: I-IATF iguqulela iimfuno zokwenyani zokufikeleleka kwiingqokelela zomthombo ovulekileyo.
meta.projects.description: Khangela iiprojekthi zokufikeleleka koluntu ezipapashwe nge-IATF.
meta.propose.description: Cela iprojekthi yokufikeleleka kwi-IATF ngewebhu, nge-imeyile, okanye nge-Discord.
meta.governance.description: Funda ngendlela i-IATF eyamkela ngayo iiprojekthi, elawula ngayo iindawo ekubekwa kuzo iincwadi, nendlela egcina ngayo umsebenzi usesidlangalaleni.
meta.join.description: Iindlela zokuthatha inxaxheba kwi-IATF: ukufaka igalelo kwikhowudi, ukuguqulela, ukuvavanya, okanye ukugcina iprojekthi.
meta.accessibility.description: Indlela i-IATF ezama ngayo ukugcina le webhusayithi ifikeleleka nendlela yokuxela umqobo wokufikeleleka.
meta.transparency.description: Iirekhodi zoluntu ze-IATF: izigqibo, iiprojekthi, kunye nohlaziyo zigcinwa zivulekile ngokungagqibekanga.
registry.empty.title: Azikho iiprojekthi ezipapashiweyo okwangoku
registry.empty.body: I-IATF ilungiselela iseti yayo yokuqala yeeprojekthi zoluntu.
proposal.form.title: Thumela isicelo
proposal.form.body: Gcwalisa le fomu ingezantsi ukuze uthumele isicelo kwi-IATF.
proposal.form.noscript: IJavaScript iyafuneka ukusebenzisa le fomu yewebhu. Ukuba ayifumaneki, sebenzisa i-imeyile okanye iDiscord endaweni yoko.
proposal.form.runtimeUnavailable: Ukuthumela ngokuthe ngqo akucwangciswanga kule ndawo. Le fomu iya kuvula iklayenti yakho ye-imeyile endaweni yoko.
proposal.form.ready: Xa usithumela isicelo, i-IATF iza kudala irekhodi lokungeniswa.
proposal.form.turnstileRequired: Nceda ugqibezele ukujonga ukhuselo lwe-spam ngaphambi kokuthumela.
proposal.form.turnstileExpired: Ukhuselo lwe-spam luphelelwe lixesha. Nceda ugcwalise uphononongo kwakhona ngaphambi kokuthumela.
proposal.form.turnstileError: Ukhuselo lwe-spam alukwazanga ukuqinisekiswa okwangoku. Nceda uzame kwakhona.
proposal.form.turnstileTimeout: Ukhuselo lwe-spam luphelelwe lixesha. Nceda uzame kwakhona.
proposal.form.requiredMessage: Nceda ugcwalise amacandelo afunekayo phambi kokuba uthumele.
proposal.form.success: Enkosi. Isicelo sakho sifunyenwe saza sagcinwa ukuze sijongwe.
proposal.form.successFollowUp: Ukuba uqhagamshelana ne-IATF kwakhona malunga nesi sicelo, faka isalathiso esingezantsi.
proposal.form.errorGeneric: Kukho into engahambanga kakuhle xa uthumela isicelo. Nceda uzame kwakhona. Ukuba ingxaki iyaqhubeka, sebenzisa i-imeyile endaweni yoko.
project.detail.defaultLanguageNotes: Umthombo wesiNgesi oqhelekileyo, iinguqulelo zinokongezwa kamva
footer.label: Iphepha elisezantsi
footer.blurb: Umsebenzi wokufikeleleka kufuneka ube lula ukuwuqalisa, kube lula ukuwupapasha, kwaye kube lula ukuhlala uvulekile.
footer.source: Isikhokelo semigangatho yokufikeleleka: [W3C WAI](https://www.w3.org/WAI/)Ukusetyenziswa okuxhaswe ngabasebenzisi beetekhnoloji ezincedisayo.
contact.label: Iinkcukacha zoqhagamshelwano
translation.label: Imeko yokuguqulela
translation.source: IsiNgesi lolona lwimi lusetyenziswayo kweli phepha.
translation.humanReviewed: Le nguqulelo iye yahlaziywa sisithethi esithetha ngokutyibilikayo.
translation.machineAssisted: Le nguqulelo yenziwe ngomatshini kwaye ayikahlaziywa ngokupheleleyo sisithethi esithetha ngokutyibilikayo. Iziphakamiso zamkelekile kwiGitHub.
translation.needsUpdate: Le nguqulelo iye yahlaziywa ngaphambi kokuba kuhlaziywe imithombo yamva nje yesiNgesi yaye kusenokufuneka ihlaziyiwe.
